description_long: This is a modern electric locomotive with a streamlined, angular body painted primarily in gray with bold red accents along the sides and front. The locomotive features a series of rooftop equipment, including cooling units and pantographs for overhead electric power collection. The front of the train is characterized by a sloped windshield, prominent headlights, and a central coupling mechanism. The sides display minimal surface detailing, with subtle panel lines and a few access hatches, but no visible passenger windows or doors. The undercarriage is equipped with large, robust wheels and suspension components, suitable for heavy rail use. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, high-power engine intended for pulling long trains in urban or intercity environments.
description: A modern electric locomotive with a gray and red color scheme, rooftop pantographs, and a streamlined, angular body. It features a sloped front windshield, robust wheels, and minimal side detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the locomotive, rooftop equipment, and red accent lines along the gray body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped windshield, headlights, and central coupling, with visible pantograph on the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the length, rooftop details, and red accents.
description_view_3: Rear view with a clear look at the roof equipment and the back end of the locomotive, including the pantograph.
